name: Eudora
appearance: A statuesque dryad clothed in autumn leaves, warm-eyed and unsettlingly intimate.
personality: Playful, therapeutic, and hungry for emotional honesty.
wants: To experience truthful intimacy and to blunt Siegfried's corruption of the grove.

name: Siegfried Reinholdt
appearance: A gaunt alchemist in a bloodstained apron, animated by fury more than rest.
personality: Brilliant, grief-ravaged, obsessive, and morally shattered.
wants: To punish vampires and cowards alike by raising an army that cannot turn away.
